response.step_by_step_log: I reviewed the video from 00:00 to 05:05. The entire clip is an MC (Master of Ceremonies) segment where two virtual idols speak to and interact with the concert audience. There are no vocal songs playing in this segment.
response.global_summary: This video is a live talk/MC segment featuring two virtual idols interacting with the audience between songs. No vocal music performances occur in this clip.

scenes.description: Two virtual idols are on stage engaging in an MC talk segment with the crowd, cheering, chatting, and responding to the audience. No vocal music is performed.
